\tzpentry{ID3572}{Wave Quantum State Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3572 introduces Wave Quantum State Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Psi_{\rm wave}=\sum_{l\ge 2}\sum_{m=-l}^{l} A_{l,m} Y_{l}^{m}(\theta,\lambda)\,e^{i\omega_{l,m} t}. \]
